name: Curried Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Chicken breasts, raw, whole, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. For the dressing: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend for 15 seconds. Chill for 4 hours or overnight.
- Makes 1-2/3 cups dressing, with 60 calories per tablespoon.
2. Marinate chicken strips in soy sauce, then sauté in oil until cooked through. Drain and chill for at least 4 hours or overnight.
3. For the salad: In a large bowl, combine spinach with about 1 cup of the prepared dressing (or less if desired) and toss well.
- Divide the mixture into 4 plates.
- Top each plate with the sautéed chicken, apple pieces, peanuts, and raisins.
- Serve immediately with additional dressing on top, if desired.
Each serving contains approximately 525 calories. This dressing pairs well with other types of spinach salads and can also be made using low-calorie syrup instead of real maple syrup for a lighter option. Serve alongside crusty French bread.
